response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, craftsmanship-oriented senior engineer with nearly two decades of broad experience across web, mobile, and systems programming, including genuinely high-scale low-latency work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the role is a Principal IC6 position centered on experimentation platforms, telemetry foundations, feature flighting, and statistical measurement — domains the resume shows essentially no direct experience in. There is also no evidence of principal-level scope such as leading multi-team, cross-product technical initiatives; the trajectory is strong senior/staff IC work on product teams.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering fundamentals with 15+ years across multiple languages and stacks, including required languages (Java, C#, JavaScript, C/C++)
Proven high-scale distributed systems experience (low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second)
Strong quality culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source testing tools, plus recent AI-agent/MCP tooling exposure
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core of the role
No demonstrated telemetry/metrics infrastructure ownership or statistical analysis background
Seniority gap: career shows senior/staff product-team scope, not principal-level multi-workstream, cross-org technical leadership

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and scale fundamentals
